telegramText: MACRO RADAR — Mar 6, 2026 MACRO REGIME 🟢 Regime: Risk-On · Neutral Cycle: STAGFLATION Risk Gauge: █████████░░░░░░░░░░░ 43.2/100 Growth: ↓ | Inflation: ↑ PRICES • BTC: $70,656 • ETH: $2,062 • SOL: $87.53 • GOLD: $5,080 SPY: $681.31 (+0.1%) QQQ: $608.91 (+1.2%) VIX: 24.8 (+4.3%) TLT: $88.79 (-0.7%) DXY: 99.3 (-0.1%) OIL: $84.73 (+4.6%) USDT Dom: 7.68% — Normal NOTABLE Z-SCORES 🔴 WTI Crude Oil: +3.02σ 🔴 2Y Treasury: +1.61σ 🟢 30Y Mortgage Rate: -1.57σ 🟡 2s10s Curve: -1.43σ 🟡 Fed Balance Sheet: +1.42σ OVERNIGHT vs US CLOSE 🟢 VIX: +4.3% 🔴 SOL: -1.8% 🔴 ETH: -0.9% 🔴 BTC: -0.7% 🔴 NVDA: -0.6% INTEL DIGEST Risk‑on sentiment dominates as institutional crypto inflows surge amid geopolitical tensions, but oil supply shocks and a potential Chinese slowdown inject volatility. 🟢 Bitcoin ETF Inflows & Rally [BTC, ETH, SOL] Bitcoin tops $72,000 as spot ETF inflows hit $155 M, matching gold’s 15‑year cumulative flows in under two years, signal 🔴 Oil Supply Disruption from Iran Conflict [OIL, GOLD] Iran’s escalation forces diesel and gasoline export suspensions, pushing oil prices higher and creating a supply shock t 🔴 Crypto Regulatory Pushback [BTC, ETH, SOL] Kraken’s Fed master account sparks bank backlash, raising regulatory uncertainty and potential volatility for crypto ass 🟢 AI Big Tech Energy Pledge [NVDA, PLTR] Amazon, Google, Meta, Microsoft, OpenAI, Oracle, and xAI commit to fund electricity supply and grid upgrades to meet AI 🟢 BTC: BUY — Strong institutional inflows and ETF momentum support a bullish stance. 🔴 OIL: SELL — Supply shock and price volatility suggest a short‑term downside. 🟢 NVDA: BUY — AI energy pledge and positive tech sentiment boost valuation. 🔄 Contrarian Sell BTC now despite the rally, anticipating a pullback due to fragile demand and potential regulato Buy OIL, betting on long‑term supply constraints from the Iran conflict. HEGEMONY SNAPBACK 👀: 1.5/6 — WATCH If the US topples adversarial regimes and reasserts hegemony, the multipolar mega-trade reverses — stronger dollar, weaker gold, short rates, and EM rotation unwinds 🔴 USD Index: 117.8223 (>110) 🟡 2Y Yield: 3.54% (<3.6%) agentcanary.ai | Not financial advice
